race.description: Moama Bowling Club Echuca Cup Handicap
race.comment: JUSTADEEL (2) has been given a 43 day freshen-up since finishing third beaten 1L in the LR John Dillon (Barton) Stakes at Caulfield. Looks to be ticking along well with a recent trial win. Goes well over this trip and in a country cup will be tough to beat. MODOWN (10) hits this at peak and is going well enough to feature. His effort at Geelong two back at this trip reads well and he has weight relief and an inside barrier. HUGHES (1) missed a whisker over this trip in Stakes grade and then tackled a Group 3 there the latest. Has been kept on the fresh side and has to be considered. Blinkers on to HIGHLIGHTS (3) now and he may find some form quickly. Dangerous if he can.
